commandRows.purpose: Confirm write mode was intentionally reached through manual preflight.
commandRows.failRoute: Stop if writeAllowedNow is false and no explicit human decision exists.

commandRows.purpose: Inspect real overlay structure, filled fields, unsafe text, and copying-risk wording.
commandRows.failRoute: Fix structural or unsafe-note issues before any intake.

commandRows.purpose: Reject blank, generic, approving, readiness, trading, broker, automation, performance, or real-money notes.
commandRows.failRoute: Edit real notes; keep batches blocked until lint passes.

commandRows.purpose: Validate direct-candidate sourceFitNotes contain decision, source role, claim, rewrite action, and no unsafe wording.
commandRows.failRoute: Downgrade, block, or rewrite sourceFitNotes before continuing.

commandRows.purpose: Validate batch status shape and required-note completeness.
commandRows.failRoute: Keep incomplete batches not_started or in_progress.

commandRows.purpose: Summarize complete notes, blockers, direct-candidate status, and separate-approval candidates.
commandRows.failRoute: Treat intake as triage only, not approval.

commandRows.purpose: Keep intake candidates behind a separate human approval review.
commandRows.failRoute: Reject auto-approval, learner-facing release, commercial-ready promotion, and production claims.
Fix drift before any broader curriculum checks.

commandRows.purpose: Run the full curriculum and reviewer gate chain.
commandRows.failRoute: Fix the failing gate without relaxing boundaries.

commandRows.purpose: Recheck knowledge-base, self-audit, and green grounding boundaries.
commandRows.failRoute: Do not promote generated drafts or weaken source boundaries.

commandRows.purpose: Recheck learner-facing browser candidates remain review-tracked and source-grounded.
commandRows.failRoute: Block release if learner-facing risk expands.

commandRows.purpose: Run full repo verification with TRADEGYM_SQLITE_PATH set to a temp file and clean it afterward.
commandRows.failRoute: Fix application verification failures before any next review phase.

failureRoutes.response: Do not run post-write pack as evidence; return to preflight and wait for explicit human write decision.
Keep the lesson blocked and fill notes only after actual human review work.
Use confirm, downgrade, or blocked decision in sourceFitNotes; never infer direct evidence from generated rows.
Remove advice, signals, performance, broker/order, automation, production, release, approval, and real-money wording.
Remove copied or paste-instructed source text; notes must be original human review prose.
Reset the row to not_approved and learnerFacingRelease:false; do not promote grade or production status.
Fix the failing gate and rerun from the failed command forward, preserving real notes.

forbiddenRecoveryActions: Do not delete, overwrite, or force-recreate real reviewer notes to make checks pass.
Do not copy generated sample notes into the real overlay.
Do not mark generated lessons commercial_ready.
Do not set learnerFacingRelease:true, productionReady:true, or approvalStatus other than not_approved.
Do not relax green/yellow/red or research_only source boundaries.
Do not add buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, performance claims, broker/order workflows, automation, or real-money guidance.
boundary: This post-write command pack is a future validation order only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, confirm source use, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, or make the product production-ready.
